# MCD — M365 Change Digest

> A free, 100% client-side dashboard that tracks every Microsoft 365 change from
> the public Microsoft 365 roadmap (and, optionally, a tenant's Message Center).
> Filter by product, status, release phase, cloud and platform; search; and view
> a release timeline per product. Auto-updated daily via a GitHub Action and
> deployed on Cloudflare Pages.

## What it is
- An independent project (not affiliated with Microsoft) in the msnugget family, alongside cmtrace.dev and MSFinder.
- Static site: HTML + CSS + ES5-style vanilla JavaScript on the `window.MCD` namespace. No framework, no build step for the running app.
- The whole searchable index ships with the page; all filtering/search runs locally in the browser.

## Data
- Source of truth: the public Microsoft 365 roadmap (release-communications API). Data is © Microsoft.
- Optional: a tenant's Message Center via Microsoft Graph (ServiceMessage.Read.All), merged into the same index. Off by default.
- `scripts/fetch-roadmap.mjs` fetches the roadmap; `scripts/build-data.mjs` normalizes and writes `data/changes.js` (`window.MCD.DATA` / `PRODUCTS` / `META`).

## Key pages
- `/` (index.html): marketing landing with a live "latest changes" demo.
- `/app.html`: the full dashboard — search, faceted filters, list view and per-product timeline, detail drawer.

## Links
- Source: https://github.com/FlorianSLZ/MCD
- Microsoft 365 roadmap: https://www.microsoft.com/microsoft-365/roadmap
